text.title: SSL/TLS Setup Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-current-tls
step.action: Scan each with testssl.sh. Tag grade + expiry.

step.name: install-cert-manager
step.action: Helm install cert-manager. Configure ClusterIssuer (Let's Encrypt production + staging).

step.name: issue-certs-per-host
step.action: Add Certificate resources or Ingress annotation. Validate cert appears + auto-renew configured.
step.note: Gate: If Let's Encrypt rate limits hit, switch to staging issuer + delay.

step.name: apply-modern-config
step.action: Update nginx / Traefik / Envoy config to TLS 1.3 default + modern ciphers + HSTS + OCSP stapling.

step.name: post-deploy-scan
step.action: Run testssl.sh in CI. Fail on grade < A. Store result.
